title: Easy transportation of players in a mafia style
description: This is an easy way to deal with undesirable players in a mafia style way!
body:
This mod as it states allows easy transportation of players in a mafia style, it adds many usefull items! such as Handcuffs which give the player inflicted with mining fatigue. Another item is the blindfold! the blindfold can be put on other people to inflict blindness to players!
another item is the bag which will transport players and put them out somewhere else! another item is the ball and chain! it makes players who have it equipped sink! these items are all craftable in survival so that you can use them easily!
